steps.title: Spot the qualifier
steps.content: Microcrystalline minerals share one feature with cryptocrystalline minerals: their crystals are not visible to the naked eye. The next clause introduces a difference: they can usually be seen under a microscope.

steps.title: Use a contrast transition
steps.content: Choice A signals result, Choice B introduces an example, and Choice D signals similarity. The needed transition acknowledges the shared feature while qualifying it with a contrast about microscope visibility. The answer is C.
